titleStmt.title: SII 7.355: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 355. (A.R. No. 158 of 1901). ON THE FOURTH SLAB SET UP IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
caṁdracāmaracā
ravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrī . ja
yābhyudaya śakavarṣa 1393 saṁdu nālkaneya varttamāna kharasaṁvatsara
bēsageya tiṁgaḷu modalāgi śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśva
ra śrīvīrapratāpa prauḍadēvarāya mahārāyaru vijeyanagariya siṁhā
sanaṣṭharāgi sakaḷavarnāśramadhar(ṁ)magaḷa pratipālisuttiha kāladallu
Ā rāyara Ajñādhārakarumappa śrīmanmahāpradhāna siṁgarasadaṁṇāya
kkoḍeyara nirūpadiṁ viṭhṭharasavoḍeyaru bārakkūra tuḷurājyavanu pra
tipālisuttiha kāladalu bārakūra maṇigāṟakēriyoḷagaṇa sōmanāthadē
vara saṁnidhiyallū tonaseya hedakebiḷiya beṁmaṇa bhā�tana�ḷiya hariya
paseṭṭige hegaḍe Āḷiya kōṭiyappeseṭṭi biḍāruvāravāgi biṭṭa bāḷu haṁdo
ḍiyavoḷage tā baddha bra(ṁ)hmādāyada mūlada bāḷu A bāḷa catussī
meya vivara mūḍalu kēcaṇa vuṁgurupaḷiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu sā
vāyyara gaḍiyiṁda baḍagalu paḍuvalu kōṭiyappaseṭṭi tū
gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu gaṇapaṇaseṭṭiya gaḍiyiṁda teṁkalu
yiṁtī cetussīmeyoḷaguḷa hāneyaḍiya bāḷu bittuva be�gaṇagilu
nāghaṁḍugadalu mu 8 yeṁṭu muḍe gadde keṟesahavāgi biḍāruvāravā
gi biṭṭu kaḍaṁkoṁḍa ha ga 165 yi bāḷiṁge teṟu kēśavanāthavuṁgu
rupaḷiya hadhi mu 3 . nāraṇavuṁgurupaḷiya hadhi mu 1 . teṟu ka
ḷaci nāghaṁḍugadalu Akki mu 10 yi Akkiyanū sōmavāra Āmā
vāse pu(ṁ)ṇyakāladalu śrīsōmanāthadēvara mosarōgarada naivē
dyakke dānadhārāpūrvvakavāgi hariyappaseṭṭiye [A]ṣṭu koṭṭanu .
yī bāḷige Artthabaṁdaru vrittibaṁdaru sōmanāthadēvarigeṁdu
voḍaṁbaṭṭeveṁdu . koṭṭa dhar(ṁ)mmaśāsana . yī bāḷa mūliya
voppa . dānapālanayōrmadhyē dānātsēyōnupālanaṁ . dā
nāt svarggamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ . śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 7.355 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
